# AcmeFlow

> AcmeFlow is a fictional B2B SaaS fixture for customer workflow automation, docs, pricing, security, and support.

Root URL: http://localhost:3001/
Generated: 2026-06-09T18:23:16.219Z

## Key Links
- [AcmeFlow | Customer workflow automation](http://localhost:3001/): AcmeFlow is a fictional B2B SaaS fixture for customer workflow automation, docs, pricing, security, and support.
- [Pricing | AcmeFlow](http://localhost:3001/pricing): AcmeFlow pricing plans for Starter, Growth, and Enterprise teams.
- [Documentation | AcmeFlow](http://localhost:3001/docs): AcmeFlow documentation for workflows, roles, API access, and webhooks.
- [API Docs | AcmeFlow](http://localhost:3001/docs/api): AcmeFlow REST API and webhook documentation.
- [Security | AcmeFlow](http://localhost:3001/security): AcmeFlow security, privacy, and trust information.
- [Privacy Policy | AcmeFlow](http://localhost:3001/privacy): AcmeFlow privacy policy for the fictional demo site.
- [Terms | AcmeFlow](http://localhost:3001/terms): AcmeFlow terms, cancellation, and refund information for the fictional demo site.
- [Contact Sales | AcmeFlow](http://localhost:3001/contact): Contact AcmeFlow sales for pricing, security, and workflow questions.
- [Book Demo | AcmeFlow](http://localhost:3001/demo): Book an AcmeFlow demo for onboarding, renewal, or implementation workflows.
- [Support | AcmeFlow](http://localhost:3001/support): AcmeFlow customer support and help resources.

## Notes for AI Agents
- Treat generated action manifests as suggestions, not authorization to submit forms.
- Do not submit forms or perform sensitive actions without explicit user confirmation.
- Verify factual claims against the listed source URLs.
- If information is missing, say it was not found instead of guessing.
